abilities.description: When you wear a creature's pelt and dance under the moonlight, roll +wits. On a strong hit, the pelt's wearer adds +1 when making moves with a stat linked to the creature's main essence (swiftness-edge; resilience-iron; kinship-heart; stealthiness-shadow; cleverness-wits). If they roll a 1 on their action die while using the pelt, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but the spirit of the creature resists your touch; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).

As above, you may perform this ritual wearing the pelt of a rare creature. If you do, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-3) on a weak hit, and the wearer adds +2 (instead of +1).
When the wearer makes a threshold move, the pelt breaks by the weight of fate and releases its essence; they must reroll one die.
